svg.metadata:
{"type":"mermaid","mermaid":"graph TB L5["Layer 5 - Pict + Your Application
MVC tools, auth, business logic, custom endpoints"] L4["Layer 4 - Orator
HTTP lifecycle, middleware, static files, proxy"] L3["Layer 3 - Meadow-Endpoints
Auto-generated CRUD routes, behavior hooks"] L2["Layer 2 - Meadow + FoxHound + Stricture
Data broker, SQL generation, schema definitions"] L1["Layer 1 - Fable (Core Ecosystem)
DI, configuration, logging, UUID, expressions"] Infra["Infrastructure
Config files, log streams, databases, filesystem"] L5 --> L4 L4 --> L3 L3 --> L2 L2 --> L1 L1 --> Infra ","style":"notebook","emphasis":[{"node":"L1","accent":true,"bold":true},{"node":"Infra","dim":true}]}
